title: dioscorea panamensis
intro: Dioscorea panamensis is a species of yam native to Central and South America, belonging to the Dioscoreaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits associated with Dioscorea panamensis include improved cardiovascular health, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. Dioscorea panamensis can be prepared as a supplement in capsule or powder form, or used as a tea by steeping the dried roots in hot water.
